description:
Mario Sports Mix is a fast-paced Wii sports game that includes basketball, volleyball, dodgeball, and hockey.
Play as characters from the Mario, Final Fantasy and Dragon Quest franchise in order to defeat the evil in this
land and conquer all the sports!

v0.0.1.description:
# Mario Sports Mix AP First Release!
# English
## To Read

v0.0.1.title: Mario Sports Mix Archipelago v0.0.1

v0.0.1-h1.description:
# Mario Sports Mix AP v.0.0.1 Hotfix

## What's changed?:
- Normal Cups are now forcibly made
- You can select if you want Hard Cups on or off
- Fixed Behemoth King region not getting created when goal is Defeat Behemoth

### GECKO CODES HAVE NOT CHANGED, I WILL STATE IF THEY HAVE
v0.0.1-h1.title: Mario Sports Mix AP v.0.0.1 Hotfix

v0.0.1-h2.description:
# Mario Sports Mix AP v0.0.1 Hotfix 2
# What's Changed
I used the dev one, not the release one.
v0.0.1-h2.title: Mario Sports Mix AP v0.0.1 Hotfix 2

v0.0.1-h3.title: Mario Sports Mix AP v0.0.1 Hotfix 3

v0.1.0.description:
# What's changed?
- Full NTSC-U support!
- Added Deathlink
- Fixed commands + added new ones
- Automatic game region detection
- Gecko codes are no longer required, they are applied in the client
- Changed common addresses to use cached values
- Fixed ?-Panel replacement
- More stuff I forgot
v0.1.0.title: Mario Sports Mix AP v0.1.0

v0.1.0-beta.description:
# Mario Sports Mix AP v0.1.0-beta
## What's changed?
- Testing NTSC-U support
- Fixed Filler items and /item command

## If using NTSC-U, please enable 3 random characters in your yaml, things **may and will** break if not as the gecko codes currently are only for PAL
v0.1.0-beta.title: Mario Sports Mix AP v0.1.0-beta

v0.1.0-beta2.description:
## What's Changed?

Fixed a few errors to do with special meter and the game not being ready to handle

## If using NTSC-U, please enable 3 random characters in your yaml, things **may and will** break if not as the gecko codes currently are only for PAL
v0.1.0-beta2.title: Mario Sports Mix AP v0.1.0-beta2

v0.1.0-beta3.description:
## What's changed?
Added/Changed memory addresses, should fix some issues caused with NTSC-U compatibility.

### If using NTSC-U, don't use gecko codes + Please use 3 character starting, things may or may not break
v0.1.0-beta3.title: Mario Sports Mix AP v0.1.0-beta3

v0.1.0-beta4.description:
## What's changed?
- Added more conditions for ready_to_handle so error messages don't come up
- Added the ability to change duration of matches in exhibition, to do with ready_to_handle
v0.1.0-beta4.title: Mario Sports Mix AP v0.1.0-beta4
